title: MC Paxels
description:
Adds Paxels to vanilla Minecraft.
Comes as both a Datapack and a mod!
body:
![5 of the new 6 Paxels together.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da8c1bf18f6af1e5b10c6b5b937ab2ba0ef3a0c2.png)
## Summary
This datapack adds Paxels to Minecraft using the 1.20.5 update. Yeah, that's about it.
### Gameplay
You can craft one with an Axe, Shovel, and Pickaxe of the tooltype you want.
There are 6 types of Paxels:
- Wooden Paxels
- Stone Paxels
- Iron Paxels
- Golden Paxels
- Diamond Paxels
- and Netherite Paxels.
  
An important note is that Paxels do not transfer over the enchantments of the tools used to craft them, and you craft the Netherite Paxel with 3 Netherite tools--NOT by upgrading a Diamond Paxel.

They can also only be used on trees to strip them, so you can't path grass with them. I'm considering making a change for this in the future, but I'm debating it.

There are 2 advancements you can get from this pack. One for crafting any type of Paxel, and one for crafting a Netherite Paxel.
### Config
This is a Config menu you can access with ```/function mcpaxels:config```. That being said, there aren't any settings you can edit. But you can access a list of commands using the book, and also uninstall the pack with it.
### Commands
You can give yourself a paxel manually by giving yourself a Knowledge Book with a ```[custom_data]``` component.

The component would have the data ```{item_id:(paxel_name)}```.

This would look like: ```/give regfunkid knowledge_book[custom_data={item_id:wooden_paxel}] 3``` to give regfunkid 3 Wooden Paxels.
